command: echo '=== mt5.service unit ===' && systemctl cat mt5.service 2>/dev/null && echo '=== xvfb.service unit ===' && systemctl cat xvfb.service 2>/dev/null && echo '=== mt5.service status ===' && systemctl status mt5.service --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -15 && echo '=== Old watchdog ===' && cat /root/PropFirmBot/scripts/watchdog.sh 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo '=== Clear crontab completely ===' && echo '' | crontab - && echo 'Crontab cleared' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null
